title: Handy Packs
description: Clean up that early clutter, a better bundle.
body:
Handy packs that are cheap early game to remove that messy inventory, but at a cost of only 9 slots.

![Handy Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3c72af5a80c8f7fb27bf78eb07233c8342ca799.png)

Simply craft the Handy Pack with 5 leather or rabbit hide, any planks, and an iron ingot.
